title: BTWR: Data Suite
description: Data suite for the Better Than Wolves: Remastered project.
body:
Core compatibility mod for the "Better Than Wolves: Remastered!" modpack. Provides many changes to how the BTWR related mods operate together and should only be used with the BTWR modpack.

The mod has many different features/changes to list separately, but here is the gist of it:

## Adds things like:
+ New items related to BTWR which don't fit into any of the mods by themselves
+ New entities related to BTWR which don't fit in the any of the mods by themselves

## Changes things like:
+ Recipes
+ World loot
+ Block & Entities loot tables
+ Block mechanics

Once again, keep in mind that this mod shouldn't be used by itself.

---

More information you can currently find on the BTWR: Core mod page -> [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/btwr-core)

More information about the project once the modpack releases -> [here](https://modrinth.com/project/better-than-wolves-remastered)
